name: Prawns in Black Bean Sauce (See Jup Ha Kow)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the prawns by shelling, deveining, and cleaning them. Blot dry.
2. Wash and rinse the salted black beans 2 or 3 times.
3. Combine the black beans with garlic and ginger, and mash until pasty.
4. Add stock and cornstarch to the bean mixture; set aside.
5. Heat a wok, add 1 tablespoon oil, and reheat.
6. Stir fry green pepper for 1 minute; set aside.
7. Add another tablespoon of oil to the wok, then stir fry prawns with salt until they turn pink.
8. Add the black bean mixture and stir until thickened.
9. Return the green pepper to the dish and serve.
Do-ahead notes:
The preparation can be done ahead of time.
Yield: 4 servings
